g.text: Match Monitor Group Betting - Database Operations Flow
New SequenceID = MAX(SequenceID) from inserted tickets
GROUP_CONCAT(SequenceID ORDER BY SequenceID SEPARATOR ',') AS SequenceIDList,
GROUP_CONCAT(CTSCustID ORDER BY CTSCustID SEPARATOR ',') AS CTSCustIDList,
GROUP_CONCAT(CustID ORDER BY CustID SEPARATOR ',') AS CustIDList,
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT LicenseCustID ORDER BY LicenseCustID SEPARATOR ',') AS LicCustList,
GROUP BY MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam, SportType
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 -- At least 2 tickets for group detection
ORDER BY MatchID, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam;
SELECT CustID, DeviceID, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(...) AS GroupID
WHERE CustID IN (SELECT CustID FROM TempCustIds)
... (Call ML service or complex pattern matching)
SELECT CustID, IPAddress, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(...) AS GroupID
WHERE CustID IN (SELECT CustID FROM TempCustIds)
-- (If A-B same group, B-C same group â†’ A-B-C same group)
-- Join staging data with group detection
JOIN TempGroupDetection g ON s.CustID = g.CustID
-- (Complex logic based on partial matches, edge cases)
